productDisplayName: Nike Women Vomero-5 White Grey Blue Shoe
description: THEY RESPOND TO YOUR RUN If you’re looking for the most cushioned running experience, you’re looking at the absolute shoe – the nike Zoom Vomero+ 5. A refined performance classic, the nike Zoom Vomero+ 5 shoe combines the best of its predecessor, the Nike Zoom Vomero, the Vomero+ 5 has an enhanced Fit, smoother ride and lighter weight. In fact, unlike the earlier version, the Vomero+ 5 has a breathable open mesh upper with no-sew overlays through the forefoot to ensure a snug, secure and seam free fit. This style of bonding of the shoe not only enhances support to the foot, it also reduces chaffing and irritation. Weighing an average of just about 329 grams, the Nike Zoom units employed in the sole region of the Nike Zoom Vomero+5 range of shoes ensure lightweight, responsive cushioning, making running an experience to reckon with. Flex and stretch as much as you like An absolute in comfort for underpronators to neutral gait runners with normal to high arches, the Nike Zoom Vomero+ 5 falls under the neutral category of running shoes. These shoes have elastic mesh panels for a lockdown and adaptable fit of the feet. The stretch panels work along with the other parts of the shoe and ensure that the middle part of the foot is kept locked and in place, while allowing it to stretch and flex with absolute ease, comfort and support. The Nike Zoom Vomero+ 5, which weighs an average of 278 grams for women’s shoes and 329 grams for men’s shoes, has an external heel counter that wraps around the heel for a snug fit. What comes as a cherry on the icing with the Nike Vomero+ 5 shoe is the inner-sleeve or bootie for a plush fit and comfort. The Vomero+ 5, in fact, is much loved by runners for its heel and forefoot responsive cushioning created by the Nike Zoom units, besides, of course, a full length, soft midsole for added durability and cushioning. Segmented heel for quick moves The Nike Zoom Vomero+ 5 shoe has a crash pad below the heel that is more segmented than its earlier models. This ensures better shock absorption, smoother transition and cushioning when the heel strikes the ground. There are extensions of blown rubber infused in the heel to provide a smoother and more efficient stride even when enhancing cushioning. There is an additional injected phylon (IP) pressure path under the arch to ensure that the feet are in contact with the ground, adding to the stability and impact guidance system factor. Safe runs at dusk All of the Nike Zoom Vomero+ 5 shoes are constructed with reflective elements so that runners can enjoy their sport even under low visibility, with safety. These shoes also come with arch supports to ensure stability while the feet move naturally. There are, in fact, multiple types or rubber and traction patterns employed to ensure that the running stride is kept smooth, allowing the knees and feet to stay in shape. With flex grooves in place, there’s an abundance of flexibility and smooth, efficient runs that you can earn with this Nike+ range. Add on Nike+ compatible products like your goal and workout monitors and there’s no stopping you. Upper Largely open-mesh upper for breathability and comfort Partial bootie for a plush, comfortable fit and feel Soft, pliable sock liner to give a customized fit with great support Reflective elements for visibility in low-light condition Heel and forefoot Nike Zoom units for lightweight, responsive cushioning Segmented crash pad for shock-absorption and a smooth transition Midsole Full-length, soft EVA midsole for responsive cushioning and durability Outsole Multiple types of rubber and traction patterns for a smooth stride Flex grooves for flexibility and a smooth, efficient stride Areas of blown rubber on the outsole extended to promote a smooth, efficient stride while enhancing cushioning Wash care1. Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine wash
